%% Procedure to obtain "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability"] -->|"event is active"| B["Participate in the Event Quests"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe"]
    C -->|"Fine Tea, Full Moon recipe"| D["Learn the Recipe"]
    D --> E["Gather Ingredients"]
    E -->|"Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"| F["Cook the Dish"]

%% Procedure to create a Nether Portal in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Basic Resources: Wood (-> Wood Logs), Crafting Table (-> Crafting Table), Wooden Pickaxe (-> Wooden Pickaxe)"] --> B["Mine for Stone and Iron: Cobblestone (-> Cobblestone), Iron Ore (-> Iron Ore)"]
    B --> C["Smelt Iron: Furnace (-> Furnace), Iron Ingots (-> Iron Ingots)"]
    C --> D["Collect Water and Lava: Bucket (-> Bucket), Water Source (-> Water Source), Lava Source (-> Lava Source)"]
    D --> E["Create Obsidian: Obsidian (-> Obsidian)"]
    E --> F["Build Nether Portal: Portal Frame (-> Portal Frame)"]
    F --> G["Activate Nether Portal: Flint and Steel (-> Flint and Steel)"]
    G --> H["Enter the Nether"]

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 skill in Monster Hunter Generations

    B -->|"Handicraft Points (-> Armor Pieces)"| C["Use Decorations with Handicraft Points"]
    C -->|"Handicraft Points (-> Decorations)"| D["Use Charms with Handicraft Points"]
    D -->|"Handicraft Points (-> Charms)"| E["Check Skill Points in Status Screen"]
    E -->|"Handicraft +10 (-> Required Threshold)"| F["Activate Sharpness +1 Skill"]

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft

    E --> F["Make it a Lingering Potion"]

%% Procedure to get the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD

    B -->|"3 or more altars broken"| C["Mine Titanium Ore"]
    C -->|"Titanium Ore (-> Titanium Ore)"| D["Smelt Titanium Bars"]
    D -->|"Titanium Bars (-> Titanium Bars)"| E["Craft the Titanium Sword"]
    E -->|"the Titanium Sword (-> Titanium Sword)"| F["You now have the Titanium Sword!"]

%% Procedure to center text between two cells in Microsoft Excel without merging them
flowchart TD

    B --> C["Open the Format Cells Dialog"]
    C --> D["Navigate to the Alignment Tab"]
    D --> E["Select 'Center Across Selection'"]
    E --> F["Apply the Changes"]
    F --> G["Verify the Result"]

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI for Valorant Vanguard anti-cheat
flowchart TD

    B --> C["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    C --> D["Enable Secure Boot"]
    D --> E["Save and exit"]
    E --> F["Verify Secure Boot is on"]
    F --> G["Check Secure Boot State (-> On)"]

%% Procedure to defeat all bosses in Hollow Knight in optimal order
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat False Knight (-> Forgotten Crossroads)"] -->|"Nail, base health, 1 Mask Shard"| B["Defeat Gruz Mother (-> Forgotten Crossroads)"]
    B -->|"Same as False Knight"| C["Defeat Vengefly King (-> Greenpath)"]
    C -->|"Basic nail, 4-5 masks"| D["Defeat Hornet (Protector) (-> Greenpath)"]
    D -->|"Mothwing Cloak (dash), 4-5 masks"| E["Defeat Massive Moss Charger (-> Greenpath)"]
    E -->|"Dash"| F["Defeat Mantis Lords (-> Fungal Wastes - Mantis Village)"]
    F -->|"Dash, 6+ masks, Quick Focus or Thorns of Agony"| G["Continue to next boss (-> Deepnest)"]

%% Procedure to connect a Nintendo Switch to a PC for gameplay capture
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Your Equipment: Nintendo Switch (-> Switch), Switch dock (-> Switch dock), HDMI cable (-> HDMI cable), AC power adapter (-> AC power adapter), USB capture card (-> Capture Card), USB cable (-> USB cable), PC (-> PC)"] --> B["Set Up the Switch Dock"]
    B --> C["Connect to the Capture Card"]
    C --> D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    D --> E["Install Software"]
    E --> F["Start Playing"]
    F --> |"Switch gameplay (-> Switch gameplay)"| G["Record or Stream Gameplay"]

%% Procedure to play 2-Player Split-Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Your Setup: Platform (-> PlayStation, Xbox), Displays (-> one TV or monitor), Controllers (-> two controllers)"] --> B["Start Fortnite (-> Fortnite)"]
    B --> C["Sign In Player 1 (-> Player 1’s Epic Games account)"]
    C --> D["Connect Player 2’s Controller (-> second controller)"]
    D --> E["Join Player 1’s Lobby (-> Player 2’s controller)"]
    E --> F["Select a Game Mode (-> Duos, Squads)"]
    F --> G["Start the Match (-> Player 1)"]
    G --> H["Play Together (-> both players)"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare: Save before fight, stock up on healing items (-> Butterscotch Pie, Snowman Piece, Tough Glove), equip high-ATK gear, ensure mental readiness"] --> B["Phase 1: Early attacks"]
    B --> C["Phase 2: Middle escalation"]
    C --> D["Final sequence: 'Last attack' (bullet hell)"]
    D --> E["After defeating Sans: Proceed to Genocide route ending"]
    B -->|"Gaster Blaster charge sound, bone attack patterns, blue/white gravity shifts"| F["Dodge with micro-movements, stay still during blue, move during white"]
    C -->|"Overlapping bone patterns, faster transitions, Karma damage accumulation"| F
    D -->|"Rapid bones, shifting gravity, Gaster Blasters, unpredictable gaps"| F
    A -->|"Butterscotch Pie, Snowman Piece, Tough Glove"| G["Use healing items only in safe windows"]
    G -->|"safe window after damage, low HP"| H["Consume healing item (-> Butterscotch Pie, Snowman Piece, Tough Glove)"]
    H --> F
    I["Practice in segments: isolate and master one pattern at a time"] --> F
    J["Use audio cues: listen for Gaster Blaster charge sounds"] --> F
    K["Minimize movement: use micro-adjustments, avoid overcorrection"] --> F
    L["Don't heal frivolously: save heals for critical moments"] --> G
    M["Expect resets: learn from each attempt"] --> I

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife

    H -->|"Elected"| I["Manage your Presidency"]
    H -->|"Failed"| J["Repeat if Necessary"]
    I --> K["Continue to Build Reputation and Wealth"]
    J --> K
    K --> H

%% Procedure to connect a Wii to a Smart TV
flowchart TD
    A["Choose Connection Method"] -->|"AV (Composite) Connection"| B["Identify the AV Cable"]
    A -->|"Component Cable Connection"| C["Obtain a Wii Component Cable"]
    A -->|"HDMI Connection"| D["Purchase a Wii to HDMI Adapter"]
    A -->|"SCART Connection"| E["Get a Wii SCART Adapter"]
    A -->|"S-Video Connection"| F["Acquire a Wii S-Video Cable"]
    
    B --> G["Locate AV Inputs on the TV"]
    G --> H["Connect the Cables"]
    H --> I["Select the AV Input"]
    I --> J["Power On the Wii"]
    
    C --> K["Locate Component Inputs on the TV"]
    K --> L["Connect the Cables"]
    L --> M["Select the Component Input"]
    M --> N["Power On the Wii"]
    
    D --> O["Connect the Adapter to the Wii"]
    O --> P["Connect an HDMI Cable"]
    P --> Q["Select the HDMI Input"]
    Q --> R["Power On the Wii"]
    
    E --> S["Plug the AV Cables into the Adapter"]
    S --> T["Connect the Adapter to the TV"]
    T --> U["Select the SCART Input"]
    U --> V["Power On the Wii"]
    
    F --> W["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs"]
    W --> X["Connect the Cables"]
    X --> Y["Select the S-Video Input"]
    Y --> Z["Power On the Wii"]

%% Procedure to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams: 2 teams, each with a Spymaster and at least one Field Operative"] --> B["Prepare the Game Board: Shuffle 25 codename cards (5x5 layout) and place on table"]
    B --> C["Select a Key Card: Draw key card showing team assignments (red, blue, neutral, assassin)"]
    C --> D["Determine Starting Team: Border color on key card indicates which team starts (extra agent to find)"]
    D --> E["Spymaster Gives Clues: Provide one-word clue and number (how many related codenames)"]
    E --> F["Field Operatives Guess: Discuss and choose codenames related to the clue"]
    F --> G["Reveal Codenames: Spymaster reveals result by placing team color card, neutral card, or opposing team card; assassin = loss"]
    G --> H["Ending a Turn: Turn ends if: correct guesses exceed number given, team stops guessing, or incorrect guess (neutral or opposing agent)"]
    H --> I["Switch Turns: Other team takes turn, repeat steps E to H"]
    I --> J["Winning: Team wins by identifying all their agents; game ends immediately if assassin is guessed (loss)"]

%% Procedure to play There Is No Game
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> There Is No Game)"] --> B["Interact with Title Screen"]
    B --> C["Break the Title: Drop the 'O'"]
    C --> D["Break the Letters: Use the fallen 'O' as a ball"]
    D --> E["Find the Trophy"]
    E --> F["Use the Trophy"]
    F --> G["Repair the Title: Break the block with the Trophy"]
    G --> H["Unlock the Goat: Enter new scene"]
    H --> I["Get the Key: Find the squirrel"]
    I --> J["Create a Nut: Knock down the tree with the Trophy"]
    J --> K["Open the Nut: Drag the nut to a hard surface"]
    K --> L["Trade with the Squirrel: Give the cracked nut"]
    L --> M["Receive the Key"]
    M --> N["Free the Goat: Unlock the cage with the Key"]
    N --> O["Watch the Ending"]
    O --> P["Final Messages"]
    P --> Q["End of Game"]

%% Procedure to set a PS5 as Console Sharing and Offline Play primary console
flowchart TD
    A["Sign in to the PSN account (-> Owner Account) on the PS5"] --> B["Update to the latest PS5 system software (if needed)"]
    B --> C["Open Settings (gear icon, top right)"]
    C --> D["Choose Users and Accounts"]
    D --> E["Select Other"]
    E --> F["Select Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    F --> G["Choose Enable"]
    G --> H["The PS5 is now set as the primary console for Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    H --> I["Other users can download the owner's games to this PS5"]
    I --> J["Once downloaded, other users can play the games offline"]
    J --> K["Ensure games are fully downloaded before offline play"]
    K --> L["Sign out of the Owner Account after enabling"]
    L --> M["Other users use their own PSN accounts to play"]

%% Procedure to build an iron farm using the "Easy Iron Golem" technique in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Choose Location: Flat area, away from other villages"] --> B["Build the Villager Chamber"]
    B --> C["Add Villagers: 3 villagers to the chamber"]
    C --> D["Create the Zombie Chamber: Adjacent to villager platform"]
    D --> E["Trap the Zombie: Lure zombie, name it 'Scary' (-> Name Tag)"]
    E --> F["Build the Iron Golem Spawn Platform: 7x7 platform above villager chamber"]
    F --> G["Water Streams: Place water buckets in opposite corners"]
    G --> H["Lava Trap: Build 3x3 chamber under water streams, place lava"]
    H --> I["Collection System: Place hoppers under lava trap, connect to chests"]
    I --> J["Final Adjustments: Ensure villagers panic, golems spawn and fall into lava"]
    J --> K["Enjoy Infinite Iron Supply"]

%% Procedure to get the Vengeful True Sun God in Bloons TD 6
flowchart TD
    A["Start with Sun God Temple: Place Super Monkey and upgrade to Sun Avatar, then upgrade Sun Avatar to Sun Temple by spending $50,000 on sacrifices from Primary, Military, and Magic categories"] -->|"Sun Temple"| B["Preparation for the True Sun God"]
    B --> C["Sacrifice for True Sun God: Upgrade Sun Temple to True Sun God by spending $50,000+ from Primary, Military, and Magic categories, and sacrifice $50,000+ in Support category towers"]
    C -->|"True Sun God"| D["Unlock the Vengeful True Sun God: Place and fully upgrade Legend of the Night (bottom path Super Monkey) and Anti-Bloon (top path Super Monkey) before upgrading Sun Temple to True Sun God"]
    D -->|"Vengeful True Sun God"| E["Final Transformation: True Sun God transforms into Vengeful True Sun God with darker appearance and enhanced powers"]
    F["Ensure Monkey Knowledge 'There's No Sun God Like A Vengeful One' is unlocked"]
    G["Plan map layout and prepare sufficient funds"]
    A --> F
    A --> G
    F --> D
    G --> D
